summary: Dashboard Reports Contemporary Theme - All 4 pages verified with new 'contemporary and elegant' design. All pages load correctly with gradient backgrounds, glass-morphism filter cards, colored stat cards with gradient accents, and clean table styling.
passed_tests: SalesRevenueDashboard (/sales-revenue) - loads with contemporary theme, 4 stat cards (Won Deals/Gross Revenue/Net Revenue/Credit Notes), glass-morphism filter card, data table

SKUPerformance (/sku-performance) - loads with contemporary theme, 4 stat cards (Total Target/Total Achieved/Units Sold/Avg Achievement), 7 filters including SKU dropdown, data table with trend indicators
ResourcePerformance (/resource-performance) - loads with contemporary theme, 5 stat cards, rank badges (Award icons) for top 3 performers, color-coded achievement percentages
AccountPerformance (/account-performance) - loads with contemporary theme, 7 stat cards (Gross Total/Net Total/Avg Order/Bottle Credit/Outstanding/Overdue/Accounts), Account Type filter, Tier badges
Filter dropdowns work on all pages (Time Period, Territory, State, City)
Reset button clears filters on all pages
Navigation between all 4 report pages via sidebar works correctly
data-testid attributes present on all 4 dashboards
critical_code_review_comments: Contemporary theme applied consistently across all 4 pages
Glass-morphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl) used on filter cards
Gradient accents on stat cards with appropriate color coding
data-testid attributes added: sales-revenue-dashboard, sku-performance-dashboard, resource-performance-dashboard, account-performance-dashboard
Proper hover states and transitions on table rows and cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard reports contemporary theme successfully applied to all 4 pages. Routes: /sales-revenue, /sku-performance, /resource-performance, /account-performance. SKUPerformance and ResourcePerformance use MOCK data when API endpoints don't exist (as noted in mocked_api config). All pages have consistent styling with gradient backgrounds, glass-morphism cards, and colored stat cards.

mocked_apis.note: SKUPerformance and ResourcePerformance fall back to mock data when API endpoints /api/reports/sku-performance and /api/reports/resource-performance return errors
mocked_apis.behavior: Mock data is generated client-side based on sales team data from /api/users

theme_verification.stat_cards: Colored gradient accents with matching icons
theme_verification.tables: Clean styling with hover states and proper spacing
